Queue API

Create durable jobs and inspect their status.

POST /v1/jobs

The request body contains a task name and JSON payload.

{
  "task": "rebuild-index",
  "payload": {"tenant": "north"},
  "priority": 3
}

Responses

202 Accepted
The job was queued.
400 Bad Request
The payload failed validation.
429 Too Many Requests
Retry after the supplied delay.

GET /v1/jobs/{id}

Returns queued, running, complete, or failed.
